decision.summary: No existing position needs action and no active BTC market offers a valid playbook-compliant entry.
decision.rationale: Current account state and Polymarket both show no open positions, so no stop-loss or take-profit management applies. The latest transcript and 2026-03-27 summary shift Beecthor to a more clearly bearish continuation thesis, with 65k as decisive support, possible downside toward 62.7k and 59k, and only a tactical rebound risk toward 68k-69.5k or 70k. Binance confirms weak execution reality with BTC at 66058.46 after a 24h low of 65548.25. Under nearest-strike-first, the first bearish market is 65k dip, but its Yes probability is only 9.5%, below the required 50%; upside reach markets above price are also far below 50%, while high-probability No sides are already priced too aggressively and conflict with the rebound risk Beecthor still allows.
